prompt: First-person perspective in a premium dimly lit cinema, holding a modern smartphone with a glowing teal interface framing a large bucket of buttery popcorn and a cold soda cup with condensation. Subtle cyberpunk aesthetic with soft neon teal and blue light streaks reflecting off the cinema seats. High-end lifestyle photography, cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field. A holographic, translucent data overlay with abstract charts and glowing green nodes floats near the popcorn, representing nutritional scanning. 8k resolution, photorealistic, vertical composition.
negative_prompt: text, letters, numbers, words, logo, watermark, QR code, distorted hands, extra fingers, blurry face, messy background, low quality, illustration, cartoon, signature
notes: Used a first-person POV to mimic the user's experience described in the post (scanning food with a phone).
Incorporated the 'teal/green + blue' brand palette through the phone's glow and holographic UI elements.
Maintained the 'premium cyberpunk' style by using holographic data overlays instead of flat UI, ensuring no readable text is present.
Set the scene in a cinema to directly align with the post's narrative of tracking calories during a movie.
